ddt:Target.Name: N_H60A_BCM(RKE)_VC_20170628
ddt:Target.Description:
[6] 2017/06/06 Nissan XX6 C.Kudo Modified project's setting.
[5] 2017/05/29 Nissan XX6 C.Kudo Modified config datas.
[4] 2016/10/28 Nissan XX6 C.Kudo Regarding config, added 5 data and modified 1 data.($1113-$1119)
[3] 2016/03/31 Nissan XX2 C.Kudo Added x60B Project tag.
[2] 2016/2/16 XX2 R.Urushihata Modified dataname for $116A.
[1] 2016/2/12 XX2 R.Urushihata Mofified
New 2015/12/25 S.shiota

Data.Name: DOOR LOCK TIMER-LOCK STATUS SW DR

Item.Text: received ID is not equal to ID in memory 1
received ID is equal to ID in memory 1
received ID is not equal to ID in memory 2
received ID is equal to ID in memory 2
received ID is not equal to ID in memory 3
received ID is equal to ID in memory 3
received ID is not equal to ID in memory 4
received ID is equal to ID in memory 4
received ID is not equal to ID in memory 5
received ID is equal to ID in memory 5
received ID is equal to ID in memory 1 to 5
received ID is not equal to ID in memory 1 to 5
received ID is not equal to ID in memory 1
received ID is equal to ID in memory 1
received ID is not equal to ID in memory 2
received ID is equal to ID in memory 2
received ID is not equal to ID in memory 3
received ID is equal to ID in memory 3
received ID is not equal to ID in memory 4
received ID is equal to ID in memory 4
received ID is not equal to ID in memory 5
received ID is equal to ID in memory 5
received ID is equal to ID in memory 1 to 5
received ID is not equal to ID in memory 1 to 5

Item.Text: recived ID is not equal to ID in memory 1 to 4
recived ID is equal to ID in memory 1 to 4
recived ID is not equal to ID in memory 4
recived ID is equal to ID in memory 4
recived ID is not equal to ID in memory 3
recived ID is equal to ID in memory 3
recived ID is not equal to ID in memory 2
recived ID is equal to ID in memory 2
recived ID is not equal to ID in memory 1
recived ID is equal to ID in memory 1
receive ID has been registered or non ID received
received ID has not been registered

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCStatusAvailabilityMask
Data.Comment: DTCSAM

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCMaskRecord
Data.Comment: DTCMREC_DTC

Data.Name: DTCRecord
Data.Comment: DTCASR_DTC

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: BCM to lock all doors CDL motors for 0.3 sec
BCM to unlock all doors CDL motors for 0.3 sec
BCM to unlock driver door CDL motors for 0.3 sec
BCM to unlock others door CDL motors for 0.3 sec
BCM to stop RR DEF relay.
BCM to drive RR DEF relay.
BCM to send CAN message (ID 60D BuzzerRequest : 00000)
BCM to send CAN message (ID 60D BuzzerRequest : 10101)
BCM to send CAN message (ID:60D BuzzerRequest: 00000)
BCM to send CAN message (ID:60D BuzzerRequest: 11001)
BCM to send CAN message (60D BuzzerRequest : 00000)
BCM to send CAN message (60D BuzzerRequest : 00001)
BCM to send CAN message (ID:358 TpmsWarningLampRequest: 0)
BCM to send CAN message (ID:358 TpmsWarningLampRequest: 1)
BCM turn off room lamp (progressive extinction)
BCM to turn on room lamp (progressive lighting)
BCM to turn off security Indicator
BCM to turn on security Indicator continuosly
BCM to send CAN message for 0.5 sec (AntiTheftHornRequest : 1)
BCM to send CAN message(When"BULB" in Configuration is H4 HighBeamRequest:0 When"BULB" in Configuration is HID HighBeamRequest:0)
BCM to send CAN message for 0.5 sec(When"BULB" in Configuration is H4 HighBeamRequest : 1 When"BULB" in Configuration is HID High,LowBeamRequest : 1 )
BCM to unlock Back Door Actuator for 0.5sec.
BCM to stop flashing DI Lamp BCM to send CAN message (FlashingIndicatorStatus : 000)
BCM to flash RH DI Lamp continuously BCM to send CAN message (FlashingIndicatorStatus : 010)
BCM to flash LH DI Lamp continuously BCM to send CAN message (FlashingIndicatorStatus : 001)
BCM to send CAN message (HornChirp : 1 for 0.3 sec)
BCM to send CAN message (LowBeamRequest : 0) BCM to send CAN message (HighBeamRequest : 0)
BCM to send CAN message Halogen type (LowBeamRequest : 0, HightBeamRequest : 1) H.I.D type (LowBeamRequest : 1, HightBeamRequest : 1)
BCM to turn off rear fog lamp
BCM to turn on rear fog lamp
BCM to send CAN message (DayTimeRunningLight turn OFF. Request : 0)
BCM to send CAN message (DayTimeRunningLight turn ON Request : 1)
BCM to stop RR Wiper motor
BCM to drive RR Wiper motor
BCM to output Door Lock (ALL) for 0.3 sec
BCM to output Door Unlock (ALL) for 0.3 sec
BCM to send CAN message (60D BuzzerRequest : 00000)
BCM to send CAN message (60D BuzzerRequest : 10100)
BCM to send CAN message (ID:358 Tpms Run Flat Warning Lamp Request: 0)
BCM to send CAN message (ID:358 Tpms Run Flat Warning Lamp Request: 1)
BCM to send CAN message (60D BuzzerRequest : 00000)
BCM to send CAN message (60D BuzzerRequest : 11000)
BCM to send CAN message (60D BuzzerRequest : 00000)
BCM to send CAN message (60D BuzzerRequest : 10000)
BCM to send CAN message (60D BuzzerRequest : 00000)
BCM to send CAN message (60D BuzzerRequest : 10011)
BCM to turn off light and darkness judgment BCM to send CAN message (ClusterIlluminationrequest : 0, MR output OFF )
BCM to turn on light and darkness judgment BCM to send CAN message (ClusterIlluminationrequest : 1, MR output ON )
BCM to lock SUPERUNLOCK motors for 0.3 sec
BCM to lock SUPERLOCK motors for 0.3 sec
not send diagnostic command to ACU
BCM to turn off Door Lock Indicator
BCM to turn on Door Lock Indicator
BCM lock all doors CDL motors for 0.3sec
BCM unlock all doors CDL motors for 0.3sec
BCM unlock driver's door CDL motor for 0.3sec
BCM unlock other door CDL motor for 0.3sec
BCM unlock Back door CDL motor for 0.3sec

Label.Text: Write SERVISE PARTS No. (Input PRATS No. with ASCII)
